allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\(d.get\('projects', {}\).get\(list\(d.get\('projects',{}\).keys\(\)\)[0] if d.get\('projects'\) else '', {}\).get\('architect',{}\).get\('build',{}\).get\('options',{}\), indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "from PIL import Image, ImageDraw, ImageFont; print\('pillow ok'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('name:', d.get\('name'\)\); print\('scripts:', list\(d.get\('scripts',{}\).keys\(\)\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('node engine:', d.get\('engines',{}\).get\('node','not set'\)\); print\('angular version:', d.get\('dependencies',{}\).get\('@angular/core','?'\)\)")
